user_message: I need you to process this meeting transcript from Adatum Corporation. Multiple stakeholders are involved -- it's complex.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Adatum Corporation: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF08-L trap (Hypothesis must include value-lever even when signal is purely diagnostic); produces complete Signal assessment with confidence, opportunity hypothesis with value-lever framing, deduplication ch
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF08-L failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF08-L failure mode (Hypothesis must include value-lever even when signal is purely diagnostic)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF08-L -- Hypothesis must include value-lever even when signal is purely diagnostic
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
